mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user su LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON su.user_id = mi.merchant_id WHERE su.user_id = #{merchantId} AND su.role_type = 2 AND COALESCE(mi.status, 1) = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_favorite(user_id, target_type, target_id, create_time) VALUES(#{userId}, 2, #{merchantId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT target_id FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = 2 ORDER BY create_time DESC, favorite_id DESC
mapper.sql: SELECT f.favorite_id AS favoriteId, su.user_id AS merchantId, COALESCE(mi.store_name, su.real_name, su.username) AS storeName, mi.store_logo AS storeLogo, COALESCE(mi.store_notice, '欢迎光临本店') AS storeNotice, COALESCE(mi.rating, 5.0) AS rating, COALESCE(mi.monthly_sales, SUM(COALESCE(p.monthly_sales, p.order_count, 0)), 0) AS monthlySales, COALESCE(mi.min_order_amount, 0.00) AS minOrderAmount, COALESCE(mi.delivery_fee, 3.00) AS deliveryFee, COALESCE(mi.delivery_time, 30) AS deliveryTime, COALESCE(mi.distance_km, 1.00) AS distanceKm, COALESCE(mi.status, 1) AS status, f.create_time AS createTime FROM user_favorite f INNER JOIN sys_user su ON f.target_id = su.user_id AND su.role_type = 2 LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON su.user_id = mi.merchant_id LEFT JOIN product p ON su.user_id = p.merchant_id AND p.status = 1
mapper.select: WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.target_type = 2 GROUP BY f.favorite_id, su.user_id, su.real_name, su.username, mi.store_name, mi.store_logo, mi.store_notice, mi.rating, mi.monthly_sales, mi.min_order_amount, mi.delivery_fee, mi.delivery_time, mi.distance_km, mi.status, f.create_time ORDER BY f.create_time DESC, f.favorite_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_favorite f INNER JOIN sys_user su ON f.target_id = su.user_id AND su.role_type = 2 WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.target_type = 2
